steps.action: Navigate to http://localhost:8000 and observe page header
steps.expected: Gear icon button visible in header
steps.observed: Gear button with '⚙ 1' badge visible in top-right corner of header

steps.action: Click gear button
steps.expected: Modal dialog opens with tokenlist management panel
steps.observed: Modal opened showing 'Token Lists' header, Uniswap Labs Default list, URL input, Import File button, Export Local button

steps.action: Click × close button on modal
steps.expected: Modal closes, main page state preserved
steps.observed: Modal closed, main page visible with pre-filled DAI address intact, all form fields preserved

steps.action: Clear localStorage and reload page
steps.expected: Clean slate with default tokenlist loaded
steps.observed: Page loaded with gear badge showing '1' (one enabled list)

steps.action: Open modal and inspect tokenlist panel
steps.expected: Uniswap default list shown with name and token count
steps.observed: Uniswap Labs Default listed with '357 tokens on ethereum', green toggle (enabled), disabled Delete button

steps.action: Open modal and enter https://tokens.coingecko.com/uniswap/all.json in URL input
steps.expected: URL accepted in input field
steps.observed: URL filled in input field

steps.action: Click Add button
steps.expected: List fetched and added to panel
steps.observed: CoinGecko list added with '5096 tokens on ethereum', green toggle, enabled Delete button, gear badge changed to '2'

steps.action: Close modal and search 'SUSHI' in autocomplete
steps.expected: Tokens from new list appear in autocomplete
steps.observed: Autocomplete shows SUSHI from Uniswap Labs Default AND AXSUSHI, CSUSHI, XSUSHI, YVSUSHI from CoinGecko with correct source labels

steps.action: Open modal and enter https://example.com/not-a-tokenlist in URL input
steps.expected: Error shown when URL doesn't return valid tokenlist
steps.observed: Error message 'Failed to fetch: Failed to fetch' displayed in red below the buttons

steps.action: Verify panel state unchanged
steps.expected: Existing lists unaffected
steps.observed: Both Uniswap Labs Default (357 tokens) and CoinGecko (5096 tokens) still listed, both enabled

steps.action: Open modal with two lists (Uniswap + CoinGecko)
steps.expected: Each list shows name, token count, enabled/disabled indicator
steps.observed: Uniswap Labs Default: name visible, '357 tokens on ethereum', green toggle (class='tokenlist-toggle enabled'), disabled Delete button. CoinGecko: name visible, '5098 tokens on ethereum', green toggle (enabled), active Delete button.

steps.action: Verify gear badge reflects enabled list count
steps.expected: Badge shows number of enabled lists
steps.observed: Gear badge shows '2' with both lists enabled, '1' when only default is active

steps.action: Open modal and enter javascript:alert(1) in URL input, click Add
steps.expected: Rejected with error message
steps.observed: Error 'Only https:// URLs are allowed' displayed in red

steps.action: Enter data:text/html,test in URL input, click Add
steps.expected: Rejected with error message
steps.observed: Error 'Only https:// URLs are allowed' displayed in red

steps.action: Enter file:///etc/passwd in URL input, click Add
steps.expected: Rejected with error message
steps.observed: Error 'Only https:// URLs are allowed' displayed in red

steps.action: Verify panel state unchanged after all rejections
steps.expected: No lists added
steps.observed: Only Uniswap Labs Default remains, no new lists from rejected URLs

evidence.network: N/A (client-side validation, no network requests made)

steps.action: Clear localStorage and reload page (clean state with only Uniswap default)
steps.expected: Only default list active
steps.observed: Gear badge shows '1', only Uniswap Labs Default loaded

steps.action: Add CoinGecko tokenlist via URL in modal
steps.expected: New list added
steps.observed: CoinGecko list added, gear badge changed to '2'

steps.action: Close modal and search 'COMP' in autocomplete
steps.expected: Tokens from newly added CoinGecko list appear with correct source label
steps.observed: Autocomplete shows: COMP (Compound) from 'Uniswap Labs Default', CCOMP (cCOMP) from 'CoinGecko', CMPT (Spatial Computing) from 'CoinGecko', CMGN (Compliant Naira) from 'CoinGecko', CUSDC (Compound USDC) from 'CoinGecko', CUSDO (Compounding OpenDollar) from 'CoinGecko'

steps.action: Verify source labels on dropdown items
steps.expected: Each suggestion shows source tokenlist name in small/muted text
steps.observed: Source labels 'Uniswap Labs Default' and 'CoinGecko' shown below each suggestion in muted text

frictions.description: Browser sessions (agent-browser) were extremely unstable — between separate Execute calls, the browser would frequently navigate to about:blank, losing all DOM state and making ref-based interactions impossible.
frictions.resolution: Chained all browser commands with && in single Execute calls. Used JavaScript eval for DOM interactions instead of ref-based commands. Used 'agent-browser wait --text' before snapshots to ensure page was loaded.

frictions.description: Docker containers stopped during testing, requiring restart. The server at localhost:8000 returned connection refused mid-session.
frictions.resolution: Ran 'docker compose up -d' to restart containers and waited 30s for startup before continuing tests.

summary: Tested 7 assertions: 7 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. All tokenlist management features (gear modal open/close, default list pre-loading, URL import, error handling, visual indicators, HTTPS scheme restriction) and cross-area autocomplete integration with managed tokenlists work correctly.
